## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Link to acceptance criteria source (issue, PROJECT section, or session entry).
- Provide checklist of criteria and status.

## Decision Log

- Link related decision entries in DECISIONS.md.
- If no new decision is needed, state why.

## QA Evidence

- Tests run:
- Results:
- Risks:

## Docs Impact

- List docs updated.
- If no docs change, explain why.

## Release and Rollback

- Deployment impact:
- Rollback plan:

## Required Checks

- [ ] I linked acceptance criteria.
- [ ] I linked decision evidence or justified none.
- [ ] I provided QA evidence.
- [ ] I described docs impact.
- [ ] I documented rollback considerations.
